info.name: Sales CRM API
info.description:
# Sales CRM API Collection

## Getting Started

1. **Register** — create an account (one time)
2. **Login** — token is saved automatically to `{{token}}` variable
3. **Get Platforms** — copy an ID to `{{platformId}}`
4. **Create Account** — copy the returned ID to `{{accountId}}`
5. **Create Proposal** — uses `{{accountId}}` and `{{platformId}}`
6. **Create Counterparty** — ID saved automatically to `{{counterpartyId}}`
7. **Create Invoice** — uses `{{counterpartyId}}`

## Base URL
Change `{{baseUrl}}` variable if needed (default: `http://localhost:3000`)

## Enums

**proposalType:** `Bid` | `Invite` | `DirectMessage`

**proposalStatus:** `Draft` | `Sent` | `Viewed` | `Replied`

**counterpartyType:** `client` | `contractor`

**invoiceStatus:** `draft` | `open` | `paid`

## Notes
- `id`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` are auto-generated by the server
- `sentAt` is set automatically when proposal `status` changes to `Sent`
- Pagination: `GET /resource?page=1&limit=10` returns `{ data: [...], total: N }`
- Invoice `lineItems` are created/replaced inline — no separate endpoint needed
- Invoice `labels` override default API field titles (e.g. `{ "to_title": "Billing Address" }`)

variable.description: JWT access token. Set automatically after Login.
Platform ID. Default is Upwork. Get full list from GET /platforms.
Account ID. Set automatically after Create Account.
Proposal ID. Set automatically after Create Proposal.
Counterparty ID. Set automatically after Create Counterparty.
Invoice ID. Set automatically after Create Invoice.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints. Run Register once, then Login — token saves automatically.

request.description: Create a new user account. Only needed once.
Login and get JWT token. Token is saved automatically to {{token}} variable.

item.name: Platforms
item.description: Platform management. Platforms are global (shared across all users). Default platforms — Upwork and LinkedIn — are seeded on first deploy.

exec: console.log('Platform ID set to:', upwork.id, '(' + upwork.title + ')');

request.description:
Get all platforms ordered by title.

Upwork ID is saved automatically to `{{platformId}}`.

**Seeded defaults:**
- `00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001` — Upwork
- `00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002` — LinkedIn
Get a single platform by ID.

Create a new platform.

**Required:** `title`, `slug`
**Optional:** `imageUrl`

`slug` must be unique. Returns `409` if already taken.

Update platform fields. All fields optional.

Updating `imageUrl` here automatically affects all accounts linked to this platform.

Delete a platform. Returns 204 No Content.

**Warning:** Cannot delete if accounts are linked to it.

item.name: Accounts
item.description: Developer account management. Each account represents a developer profile on a specific platform (e.g. Dmytro on Upwork). Scoped to the authenticated user.

exec: console.log('Account ID set to:', json[0].id, '(' + json[0].firstName + ' ' + json[0].lastName + ')');

request.description:
Get all accounts for the authenticated user, ordered by lastName then firstName.

First account ID is saved automatically to `{{accountId}}`.

Each account includes nested `platform` object with `imageUrl`.
Get a single account by ID.

Create a new account.

**Required:** `firstName`, `lastName`, `platformId`

One account per platform per user. Returns `409` if account for this platform already exists.

Get `platformId` from `GET /platforms`.

Account ID is saved automatically to `{{accountId}}`.
Update account fields. All fields optional.
Delete an account. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: Proposals
item.description: Proposal CRUD. Requires accountId and platformId — get them from /accounts and /platforms first.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Full Stack Developer — MVP Project",
  "accountId": "{{accountId}}",
  "platformId": "{{platformId}}",
  "proposalType": "Bid",
  "jobUrl": "~01abc1234567890def",
  "boosted": true,
  "connects": 6,
  "boostedConnects": 14,
  "coverLetter": "Dear client, we are excited to work on your project...",
  "vacancy": "We are looking for a React developer with 3+ years of experience..."
}

request.description:
Create a new proposal.

**Required:** `title`, `accountId`, `platformId`, `proposalType`

**Optional:** `jobUrl`, `boosted`, `connects`, `boostedConnects`, `coverLetter`, `vacancy`

**proposalType:** `Bid` | `Invite` | `DirectMessage`

**Connects rules:**
- `boosted`, `connects`, `boostedConnects` only apply for `Bid`
- If `boosted: false` → `boostedConnects` is forced to `0`
- If `proposalType` is not `Bid` → all three are forced to `false`/`0`/`0`

Proposal ID is saved automatically to `{{proposalId}}`.

Get paginated list of proposals for the authenticated user. Ordered by `createdAt` descending.

**Response:**
```json
{ "data": [...], "total": 42 }
```

Each proposal includes nested `user`, `account` (with `platform`), and `platform` objects.
Get a single proposal by ID. Includes `user`, `account.platform`, and `platform` objects.

Update any proposal fields. All fields are optional — send only what needs to change.

**status:** `Draft` | `Sent` | `Viewed` | `Replied`

When `status` changes to `Sent`, `sentAt` is set automatically by the server.
Delete a proposal by ID. Returns 204 No Content.

Get all chat messages for a proposal, ordered by `createdAt` ascending.

**Response:**
```json
[
  { "id": "...", "role": "user", "content": "...", "createdAt": "..." },
  { "id": "...", "role": "assistant", "content": "...", "decision": "bid", "reasoning": "...", "createdAt": "..." }
]
```

Analyze a message against the proposal context using AI — without generating a full chat response.

**Response:**
```json
{ "decision": "bid", "reasoning": "..." }
```

item.name: Counterparties
item.description: Counterparty management. A counterparty is a person (client or contractor) that invoices are issued to. Create a counterparty first, then use their ID when creating an invoice.

request.description:
Create a new counterparty.

**Required:** `firstName`, `lastName`, `type`
**Optional:** `info`

**type:** `client` | `contractor`

Counterparty ID is saved automatically to `{{counterpartyId}}`.

Get paginated list of counterparties ordered by `createdAt` descending.

**Response:**
```json
{ "data": [...], "total": 5 }
```
Get a single counterparty by ID.
Update counterparty fields. All fields optional — send only what needs to change.
Delete a counterparty by ID. Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: Invoices
item.description:
Invoice CRUD. Requires a counterpartyId — create a counterparty first.

**Flow:**
1. Create Counterparty → `{{counterpartyId}}` saved automatically
2. Create Invoice → `{{invoiceId}}` saved automatically
3. Update Invoice to change fields or replace line items

**Line items** are managed inline — pass them in the create/update body, no separate endpoint needed. On update, all existing line items are replaced with the new array.

body.raw:
{
  "counterpartyId": "{{counterpartyId}}",
  "number": "INV-001",
  "currency": "USD",
  "date": "2026-04-22",
  "dueDate": "2026-05-22",
  "paymentTerms": "NET 30",
  "fromValue": "Sargas Agency\n123 Main St, Kyiv",
  "toValue": "John Doe\n456 Client Ave, New York",
  "notes": "Thank you for your business!",
  "terms": "Payment due within 30 days.",
  "tax": 10,
  "showTax": true,
  "showDiscounts": false,
  "showShipping": false,
  "labels": {
    "to_title": "Billing Address",
    "notes_title": "Payment Notes"
  },
  "lineItems": [
    {
      "name": "Website Development",
      "description": "Frontend + backend implementation",
      "quantity": 1,
      "unitCost": 3000,
      "sortOrder": 0
    },
    {
      "name": "UI/UX Design",
      "description": "Figma mockups and prototypes",
      "quantity": 1,
      "unitCost": 800,
      "sortOrder": 1
    }
  ]
}

request.description:
Create a new invoice with optional line items.

**Required:** `counterpartyId`
**Optional:** all other fields

**status** defaults to `draft`. Possible values: `draft` | `open` | `paid`

**labels** — override default field titles for the PDF generator:
```json
{
  "to_title": "Billing Address",
  "ship_to_title": "Delivery Address",
  "notes_title": "Payment Notes",
  "terms_title": "Conditions",
  "unit_cost_header": "Price"
}
```

Invoice ID is saved automatically to `{{invoiceId}}`.

Get paginated list of invoices ordered by `createdAt` descending.

**Response:**
```json
{ "data": [...], "total": 12 }
```

Each invoice includes nested `counterparty` object.
Get a single invoice by ID. Includes nested `counterparty` and `lineItems` (ordered by `sortOrder`).

Update any invoice fields. All fields are optional.

**status:** `draft` | `open` | `paid`

**lineItems** — if provided, replaces ALL existing line items. Send the full updated array.
If omitted, line items are not touched.

Generate a PDF for the invoice via invoice-generator.com API.

Saves the file to `uploads/invoices/{id}.pdf` on the server and updates `pdfUrl` on the invoice.

**Response:** updated invoice object with `pdfUrl` field set.

The PDF is accessible at: `{{baseUrl}}{pdfUrl}`

**Note:** Set `INVOICE_GENERATOR_API_KEY` in `.env` to remove the watermark.

Delete an invoice by ID. Returns 204 No Content.

All associated line items are deleted automatically (cascade).
